component.name: Tweakers
component.summary: System Optimization Tool for Lilith Linux

description.p: A high-performance system optimization and utility tool for Lilith Linux, providing comprehensive system optimization and maintenance tools.

ul.li: CPU, memory, storage, GPU, network, and kernel tuning
System cleaner for caches, temporary files, and orphans
CPU, memory, and disk benchmarking suite

screenshot.caption: Main application window showing Tweaks tab

description.p: Initial release with Lilith Linux integration.

ul.li: CPU governor, turbo boost, and frequency controls
Memory management including swappiness, ZRAM, and cache pressure
NVMe storage I/O scheduler tuning and TRIM management
Intel GPU firmware and power management controls
Network optimization including BBR and TCP Fast Open
Quick profiles for battery, balanced, performance, and presentation
System cleaning for APT cache, journal, thumbnails, and temp files
CPU, memory, and disk benchmarking suite
